evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Tests, documentation and schema coverage that keep them reliable and performant; reconciliation that keeps our numbers trustworthy; revenue and costs modelled correctly from day one
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Quality, reliability, documentation, and accuracy from inception dominate—correctness in financial modelling takes priority over shipping speed.
evidence.domain_risk: Financial reporting; finance and compliance reporting; audit requests; month-end close; revenue and costs modelled correctly; reconciliation against third-party data
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Role directly powers financial reporting and audit processes in a fintech company—high consequence for errors in revenue, costs, and reconciliation.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Finance Analytics team; Head of Data; Treasury; Product; Data Engineering; Markets teams
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Multiple named teams and functions (Finance Analytics, Treasury, Product, Data Engineering, Markets) suggest established mid-stage data organization.
evidence.jd_authorship: Own dbt models end-to-end — design, build and maintain the models in your domain, with the tests, documentation and schema coverage; Automate reconciliation at scale — build automated frameworks that prove our numbers against third-party data
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific technical context (dbt, reconciliation frameworks, schema coverage, third-party data validation) shows hiring manager detail about fintech analytics engineering work.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Finance Analytics team; financial reporting; compliance reporting; finance and compliance reporting; Treasury; product and commercial teams at launch
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Primary focus is supporting finance and compliance functions—finance orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level: Own dbt models end-to-end; design, build and maintain; Drive product launch analytics; Automate reconciliation at scale; Support finance and compliance reporting
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Role owns technical domain end-to-end (dbt models, reconciliation frameworks) and leads product analytics—clear strategic technical ownership.
evidence.ai_role: Use AI effectively — apply AI tools and agents across the modelling lifecycle, from accelerating dbt development to improving data quality
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Candidate is expected to use AI tools and agents to accelerate their dbt development and analytical work.
evidence.testing_framing: Tests, documentation and schema coverage that keep them reliable; Implement data quality; peer-review code
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing and schema coverage are owned responsibilities ensuring reliability—candidate is accountable for test strategy and quality.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Reconciliation that keeps our numbers trustworthy; revenue and costs modelled correctly from day one; finance and compliance reporting; audit requests; build automated frameworks that prove our numbers
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: High emphasis on trustworthy financial reporting, audit readiness, and reconciliation—fear is bad data reaching financial statements and audit failures.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Build and own production dbt models; new products, new markets, new rails; spanning our core remittance business and new product launches; build the pipelines that make each cycle faster
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Mix of building new models for launches and maintaining core business models—both greenfield (new products/markets) and scaling existing (remittance core).
evidence.loss_aversion: Reconciliation that keeps our numbers trustworthy; revenue and costs modelled correctly from day one; finance and compliance reporting; audit requests. Role emphasizes financial accuracy and audit readiness.
